title: Missing topics management view with loading, error, and empty states
purpose: Displays a table of missing topic requests with options to create topics or dismiss requests, handling loading, error, and empty states.
module_context: Exports a React functional component MissingTopicsView that uses a custom hook to fetch missing topics and manages state for dismissing topics.

steps.content: Initialize state for tracking the topic being dismissed.
Load missing topics data using a custom hook.
Render loading spinner while data is being fetched.
Render error message with retry button if data fetch fails.
Render empty state message when no topics are present.
Render table of topics with action buttons for each row.
Display count of topics shown in the table.
Show confirmation dialog when dismissing a topic request.
Forward the topic name to the parent component's create handler.
Set the topic name in state to indicate which topic is being dismissed.
IF a topic is being dismissed, get the current user identifier.
Dismiss the topic using the hook's dismiss function with the user identifier.
Clear the topic name from state after dismissal.
Clear the topic name from state to cancel the dismissal.
